commentaries.author: Ambrose of Milan
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh You did blow with your wind, the sea covered them: they sank as lead in the mighty waters. Ambrose of Milan Moses himself says in his song, “You sent your Spirit, and the sea covered them. ” You observe that even then holy baptism was prefigured in that passage of the Hebrews, wherein the Egyptian perished, the Hebrew escaped. For what else are we daily taught in this sacrament but that guilt is swallowed up and error done away, but that virtue and innocence remain unharmed. On the Mysteries.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Wind. Septuagint, "spirit "which St. Ambrose and St. Augustine understand as the Holy Spirit. (Calmet)
